scripts.perry:check: pnpm --filter @inkdrop-codex/credential-contract build && pnpm --filter @inkdrop-codex/credential-helper exec perry check --check-deps --deep-deps --strict src/main.ts
scripts.quality: pnpm biome:check && pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm perry:check && pnpm --filter inkdrop-codex build
scripts.verify: pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build
